codeActions.title: Add trailing slash for directory
codeActions.description: Add trailing / to indicate this pattern matches only directories

codeActions.title: Negate pattern (re-include)
codeActions.description: Prefix pattern with ! to re-include previously ignored files

codeActions.title: Remove negation
codeActions.description: Remove the ! prefix to ignore this pattern again

codeActions.title: Convert to recursive pattern
codeActions.description: Prefix with **/ to match in any subdirectory

codeActions.title: Anchor to repository root
codeActions.description: Prefix with / to anchor this pattern to the repository root directory

codeActions.title: Add section comment
codeActions.description: Add a descriptive comment section header above this line

codeActions.title: Sort patterns alphabetically
codeActions.description: Sort all non-comment, non-empty patterns alphabetically within each section

codeActions.title: Remove duplicate patterns
codeActions.description: Remove duplicate ignore patterns from the file
